title: ProDec 4" Heavy Duty Long Handle Wall Scraper for Removing Paint, Grout, Adhesive, Wallpaper and More
features: Heavy duty scraper with 4" blade which easily outperforms standard scrapers
Ideal for removing wallcoverings, paint, tiles, vinyl flooring, grout, adhesives, sealant, scale and more
9" (225mm) long shaft gives greater reach and extra purchase for the most difficult tasks
Robust die cast zinc head with rust-resistant enamelled finish
Rugged handle with textured non-slip grip for comfort and reduced hand fatigue
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Power up your preparation Power through scraping jobs that lesser tools struggle to handle with this heavy duty, multi-purpose 4" (100mm) wide scraper. The blade is set in a robust die cast zinc head with rust-resistant enamelled finish, mounted onto a 9" shaft that enables you to deliver more power than standard scrapers, giving greater reach and extra purchase for the most difficult jobs. It is ideal for tasks such as stripping wallpaper - especially woodchip and textured papers - and removing paint, tiles, vinyl flooring, grout, silicone, adhesives, sealants, scale and more. The blade is secured in position by a countersunk screw, which makes for easy changing of spent blades and the rugged handle features a textured non-slip grip for comfort and reduced hand fatigue, especially during extended use. Scraping solutions from ProDec For most people, preparation is the most arduous stage of any job, but pros will tell you that doing it properly is absolutely critical to getting a long lasting finish. Whether you're scraping or raking, need a little leverage or some heavy duty muscle, ProDec has a range of scrapers to help you get your surface in tiptop condition ready for the next stage of the job. Titan 6" heavy duty scraper The daddy of them all, the 6" Titan features double thickness blades set into a cast steel head, a 20" long, 1" diameter shaft and twin soft grips for double handed action to deliver brute force scraping and power through even the toughest jobs. Titan 4" heavy duty scraper The 4" Titan may be smaller for single handed scraping, but still packs a heavyweight punch, with the same double thickness blade specification as its bigger brother. Heavy duty scrapers A range of 4" and 6" blade scrapers mounted onto a die cast head for heavy duty scraping. Long, medium and short handle versions available for a range of stripping tasks. Rosewood scrapers Durable, hardened stainless steel blade with full tang that has deliberately limited flexibility to enable it to remove lumps and other difficult to remove material without bending. Mounted onto a premium rosewood handle that minimises heat transfer with a blowtorch. Duragrip scrapers Durable, hardened stainless steel blade with full tang that has deliberately limited flexibility to enable it to remove lumps and other difficult to remove material without bending. Mounted onto a rugged soft grip handle with pound through end to quickly and efficiently hammer nails, tacks, etc. Extension pole scrapers Designed to be mounted onto any standard screw fit extension pole to generate additional power and enable even the most difficult places to be reached without ladders or platforms. Heat treated high carbon steel blade for heavy duty scraping on walls, floors and other surfaces. Available in straight and bent head profiles. Shavehooks Ideal for scraping a wide range of flat, profiled and rounded surfaces as well as raking into tight spots such as corner joints. Made from rust-resistant, heavy duty 2mm thick ground steel, they are available in triangular and combination profiles. Mini scraper A 1.5" razor blade mounted in a sturdy head that is ideal for all those little tasks that come up in many jobs such as removing paint spots, adhesives and slight surface textures. Features a protective blade cap that enables safe storage in pockets so you can keep it close to hand.
